name: start-tab
description: Start Tab for Chromium Browsers is a personal website blocker with a configurable custom new tab experience.
author: Rahul Gupta-Iwasaki, Fedor (https://github.com/lgg)

scripts.build: node build.mjs && node scripts/validate-build-output.mjs build full
scripts.build:blocker-only: node build.mjs --without-newtab --outdir=build-blocker-only && node scripts/validate-build-output.mjs build-blocker-only blocker-only
scripts.build:google: node scripts/require-google-oauth.mjs && node build.mjs --google --outdir=build-google && node scripts/validate-build-output.mjs build-google google
scripts.test: node scripts/validate-static.mjs && node scripts/validate-round6-static.mjs && node scripts/validate-round7-static.mjs && node scripts/validate-round11-static.mjs && node
